title: Lead Revenue Manager at Kerala Tourism

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Kerala Tourism
jsonLd.description:
Kerala Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kerala Tourism:
Kerala Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kerala Tourism!
